fields.label: Store
fields.description: S231 D-3-3: Department record matching the store. Carveout lookup is keyed by (store, fee_type).

fields.label: Rate Override (decimal)
fields.description: S231 D-3-3: per-store decimal rate that REPLACES the BEI Fee Schedule rate for this (store, fee_type) pair. Example: Vista Mall Management = 0.02 (2%) instead of MF schedule's 0.025 (2.5%).

fields.label: Effective From
fields.description: Optional cutover date. The current consumer (calculate_fees) treats the latest carveout as live; future enhancements may filter by billing_period.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Reason for carveout (contract amendment reference, CEO directive, etc.). Required for audit trail in `data/_CLEANROOM/2026-04-09_franchise_agreements/05_Per_Store_Fee_Carveouts.md`.
